# Sprint 1.3 Data Quality

**Sprint:** Sprint 1. Data Ingestion
**Objective:** Design and implement data ingestion pipelines from various sources into Snowflake.

## Description
Develop data quality management processes, including data validation, data cleansing, and data normalization. Implement data quality metrics and monitoring.

## Deliverable
Data quality management process
